message:
fix: priority scheduler stale-entry skip + postgres result set OOM guard

Bug 1 (MEDIUM): pop_cancel_only_with_hint did not loop to skip stale
entries already removed from the scheduled set, unlike every other pop_*
method. Could return a task that was already dispatched from another lane,
causing double-dispatch. Fixed by adding the standard loop + remove check.

Bug 2 (MEDIUM): PostgreSQL Simple Query and Extended Query result set
handlers accumulated DataRow messages into unbounded Vec. A malicious
server or runaway SELECT could cause OOM. Added max_result_rows limit
(1M, matching MySQL) that closes the connection on overflow.

Both bugs found via deep first-principles review of agent-written code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
